text: In aulas 11 and 12 you made first contact and gave a pitch: I am calling a customer, I am going to launch a new service.
In aulas 13 to 15 you described and recommended a product and shared good news: it is faster and the most reliable, and we have reached our target.

Good morning, David. What is the team doing right now?
We are calling new customers, and next month we are going to launch a service.
Great. How is the new product? Is it better than the old one?
Yes, it is more reliable. In fact, it is the most popular choice on the market.
Wonderful. So, what have we achieved this year?
We have reached our target and have achieved a big milestone together.

Good morning, team, and welcome to our business review. Let me give you a quick recap of the block. We are calling our customers every day, and we are sending more emails than before. Next quarter, we are going to launch a new service for pharmacies. Our new product is faster and more reliable than the old one, and it is the most popular choice in the region. This year, we have reached our sales target, and we have signed two big partnerships. We have done a great job together. So, please, keep in touch with your customers, and let us prepare a strong pitch for the meeting on Monday. Thank you all, and congratulations on the results.

Hello, my name is Renata, and I work in the commercial team. Let me tell you about our year. Right now, we are working on a big project, and we are calling new customers every week. Next month, we are going to present a new service. Our product is better and more affordable than before, and many people say it is the best on the market. This year, we have launched two products, and we have achieved a very important milestone. We have grown thirty percent, and the whole team is very proud. These are great results, and we are going to do even more next year. Thank you, and congratulations to everyone.

First, the team is calling customers right now, in the present continuous. Then they make a future plan: next quarter, they are going to launch a new service. After that, they compare the product: it is faster and more reliable than the old one. Next, they recommend it: it is the most popular choice in the region. Finally, they share the results with the present perfect: they have reached the sales target, and they have signed two partnerships.
